message:
feat(core): add invariant checker bridge methods and convenience API (ft-2p9cb.5.1.2)

Batch checking (check_scheduler_batch, check_budget_batch, check_recovery_batch),
snapshot extraction (check_from_scheduler_snapshot, check_from_enforcer_snapshot,
check_from_enforcement_state), query API (all_satisfied, violation_count_by_domain,
last_violation, predicate_ever_violated, predicate_pass_rate, checked_predicates,
domain_summary). 12 unit tests (625 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
